__comment__: SOURCE OF TRUTH: mirrors the live composite indexes of production (alldonealeph).
Regenerate with: firebase firestore:indexes --project alldonealeph  (then strip density + trailing __name__).
NEVER deploy this file with --force. firebase-tools deletes any live index or field
override missing from this file, and staging/prod legitimately hold extra ones.
There is no non-interactive create-only deploy: with --non-interactive and no --force,
firebase-tools throws as soon as anything live is missing here, before creating anything.
To create missing indexes, deploy INTERACTIVELY and answer no to the delete prompt:

indexes.__comment__: Activity feed - current user updates ordered by last activity
Activity feed - visible updates ordered by last activity
Heartbeat schedules - cleanup by assistant
Heartbeat schedules - cleanup by project member
MCP - Recent auth codes
Chats - visible chats ordered by last activity
Chats - visible chats filtered by type and last activity
Tasks - Template tasks query
Tasks - Done tasks with completion date
Tasks - Open tasks (not done, not subtask)
Tasks - Calendar tasks within time range
Goals - visible goals by owner
Goals - visible goals by owner and milestone date
Skills - visible skills by user
Tasks - Subtasks query
Milestones - Undone milestones by date
OAuth tokens - Valid tokens for user
VM jobs - per-user concurrency cap (execute_task_in_vm)
Gmail labeling configs - enabled private configs
OKRs - Scheduled renewal of expired active OKRs
Tasks - Assistant visible open tasks due today or overdue
Tasks - Assistant visible completed tasks by completion date
Tasks - Assistant personal completed tasks by completion date
Tasks - Assistant personal open tasks due today or overdue
Workflow AI steps - sweeper query for runs stalled in pending/running
